title: I would like a commercial company software providing and maintaining agreement between two companies

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I would like a commercial company software providing and maintaining agreement between two companies

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Agreement for Provision and Maintenance of Software Between (Company A) and (Company B)

This agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into on [date] by and between Company A, a [insert company type and state/country of registration], and Company B, a [insert company type and state/country of registration].

WHEREAS, Company A desires to provide software to Company B, and Company B desires to receive such software for its use;

WHEREAS, Company A agrees to maintain and update the software as needed to provide ongoing support for Company B;

NOW, THEREFORE, the parties agree as follows:

1. Software Provision: Company A agrees to provide the software to Company B for its internal business use. The software shall be installed and configured by Company A or its authorized agent as specified in the project scope.

2. Software Maintenance and Support: Company A will provide technical support services for the software, as described in Exhibit A, and will use commercially reasonable efforts to respond to any support requirements or software issues raised by Company B. 

a. Support services will be provided during Company A's normal business hours, and those hours will be [insert support hours].

b. Company A will use commercially reasonable efforts to provide updates, patches, and upgrades for the software. 

c. Company A will provide remote troubleshooting services to resolve software issues, utilizing remote access tools as needed.

3. Fees and Payment: Company B agrees to pay Company A for the software provision and maintenance as outlined in Exhibit B. 

a. The payment terms for this Agreement are net [insert payment terms], with any additional charges outlined in Exhibit B.

b. Any changes to the payment terms or additional charges must be agreed to in writing by both parties.

4. Intellectual Property Rights: Company A retains all rights, title, and interest in and to the software, and any updates, modifications, and enhancements made to the software pursuant to this Agreement. 

a. Company B acknowledges that it has no ownership interest in the software and agrees not to reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, or otherwise exploit the software except as permitted by this Agreement. 

b. Company B agrees not to create any derivative works based on the software.

5. Term and Termination: This Agreement shall commence on the date of signature and continue until terminated by either party with [insert termination notice period] notice to the other party. 

a. Either Party may terminate this Agreement immediately upon written notice of material breach, if the other party fails to remedy the breach within [insert remedy time frame] following written notice of such breach.

6. Confidentiality: Both parties agree to keep confidential all proprietary and confidential information obtained from the other party in connection with this Agreement, and not to use or disclose such information other than as required by law or in connection with the performance of this Agreement.

7. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [insert governing law], without regard to its conflicts of laws principles. 

a. The parties agree that any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

8. Entire Agreement: This Agreement represents the entire understanding between the parties and supersedes all prior proposals, negotiations, and agreements, whether written or oral, relating to the subject matter hereof.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

[Company A]

By: [insert signature block for authorized representative]

[Company B]

By: [insert signature block for authorized representative]

Exhibit A: Technical Support Services

Exhibit B: Fees and Payment (Include detailed payment terms)

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I would like a commercial company software providing and maintaining agreement between two companies , Flexore Group LTD and CompanyB. Flexore Group LTD is in Cyprus and CompanyB is in Dubai.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Agreement for Provision and Maintenance of Software Between Flexore Group LTD and CompanyB

This agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into on [date] by and between Flexore Group LTD, a company registered in Cyprus, and CompanyB, a company registered in Dubai.

WHEREAS, Flexore Group LTD desires to provide software to CompanyB, and CompanyB desires to receive such software for its use;

WHEREAS, Flexore Group LTD agrees to maintain and update the software as needed to provide ongoing support for CompanyB;

NOW, THEREFORE, the parties agree as follows:

1. Software Provision: Flexore Group LTD agrees to provide the software to CompanyB for its internal business use. The software shall be installed and configured by Flexore Group LTD or its authorized agent as specified in the project scope.

2. Software Maintenance and Support: Flexore Group LTD will provide technical support services for the software, as described in Exhibit A, and will use commercially reasonable efforts to respond to any support requirements or software issues raised by CompanyB. 

a. Support services will be provided during Flexore Group LTD's normal business hours, and those hours will be 9:00 am to 5:00 pm Cyprus time.

b. Flexore Group LTD will use commercially reasonable efforts to provide updates, patches, and upgrades for the software. 

c. Flexore Group LTD will provide remote troubleshooting services to resolve software issues, utilizing remote access tools as needed.

3. Fees and Payment: CompanyB agrees to pay Flexore Group LTD for the software provision and maintenance as outlined in Exhibit B. 

a. The payment terms for this Agreement are net 30, with any additional charges outlined in Exhibit B.

b. Any changes to the payment terms or additional charges must be agreed to in writing by both parties.

4. Intellectual Property Rights: Flexore Group LTD retains all rights, title, and interest in and to the software, and any updates, modifications, and enhancements made to the software pursuant to this Agreement. 

a. CompanyB acknowledges that it has no ownership interest in the software and agrees not to reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, or otherwise exploit the software except as permitted by this Agreement. 

b. CompanyB agrees not to create any derivative works based on the software.

5. Term and Termination: This Agreement shall commence on the date of signature and continue for a period of one year, unless terminated by either party with 30 days' notice to the other party. 

a. Either Party may terminate this Agreement immediately upon written notice of material breach, if the other party fails to remedy the breach within 14 days following written notice of such breach.

6. Confidentiality: Both parties agree to keep confidential all proprietary and confidential information obtained from the other party in connection with this Agreement, and not to use or disclose such information other than as required by law or in connection with the performance of this Agreement.

7. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Cyprus, without regard to its conflicts of laws principles. 

a. The parties agree that any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the Cyprus Arbitration and Mediation Center.

8. Entire Agreement: This Agreement represents the entire understanding between the parties and supersedes all prior proposals, negotiations, and agreements, whether written or oral, relating to the subject matter hereof.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

Flexore Group LTD

By: [insert signature block for authorized representative]

CompanyB

By: [insert signature block for authorized representative]

Exhibit A: Technical Support Services

Exhibit B: Fees and Payment (Include detailed payment terms)
